title: Atrakus

{{Quote|Padaunete's latest update includes eyewitness testimony from worlds as scattered as Atrakus, Teyr, Haruun Kal, and Berchest.|CIS Shadowfeed news report|<ref name="Insider71">{{InsiderCite|71|CIS Shadowfeed Dispatch 14:10:05 Edition}}</ref>}}
'''Atrakus''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="Insider71" /> located in the [[Atrakus system/Legends|Atrakus system]], a part of the [[Mikaster sector/Legends|Mikaster sector]] in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="Trailing" /> During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] watchgroup [[People's Inquest]] resumed broadcasting [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] transmissions after a temporary shutdown by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[HoloCommunications Commission]]. One particular update of the People's Inquest transmissions program included eyewitness testimony from Atrakus of what the group's leader, [[Thrynka Padaunete]], labeled as "atrocious abuse carried out in the name of" the Republic's [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]],<ref name="Insider71" /> [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]],<ref name="RHNN">{{InsiderCite|71|Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 14:10:03}}</ref> and the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]—a fact that was noted in a [[21 BBY/Legends|14:10:05]] release of the [[Shadowfeed/Legends|CIS Shadowfeed]] news and [[Propaganda/Legends|propaganda]] program maintained by the Republic's enemy in the war, the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="Insider71" />

==Behind the scenes==
Atrakus was mentioned in "[[CIS Shadowfeed Dispatch 14:10:05 Edition]]," an article written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] as an [[CIS Shadowfeed (Insider)|in-universe news report]]. It was published in the [[Star Wars Insider 71|seventy-first issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine<ref name="Insider71" /> on [[September 26]], [[2003]].<ref name="Insider date">{{SWArchive|url=community/news/2003/09/news20030924.html|text=Collectors Extravaganza in ''Insider'' #71}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Atrakus [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Atrakus itself, in grid square M-15.<ref name="TEA" />

==Appearances==
